label: About
title: About Playable Ruin Library
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 93 recent saved-signal files and 77 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Get inspired by 19 of the most interesting indie game devs and Elden Ring Art, plus 7 more. A source image from creativeuncut.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Playable Ruin Library: Playable ruin library, game-space surface as architectural section: a large chipped level-slab crosses the plate diagonally, side-lit like concept art, with painterly torn edges, weathered stone, oxidized bronze, smoky parchment, and restrained red ember seams. Two hero source apertures become major spatial events;... After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against diagonal carved library slab, large cracked circular stone relief, and top blue-white glass capsule.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
